start_time.description: ISO 8601 datetime - when the meal service starts (e.g., '2026-03-22T19:00:00')

name.description: Name of the course (e.g., Amuse-Bouche, Salad, Appetizer)

recipes.description: Array of recipe references (paths or anchors like '&recipes/celeriac-veloute')

hidden.description: Whether this course is hidden (e.g., Intermezzo)

service_offset.description: Service offset relative to service time (e.g., 'T+10min', 'T+2hr', 'T-20min')

duration.description: ISO 8601 duration - how long the course takes (e.g., 'PT10M' for 10 minutes, 'PT1H' for 1 hour)

first_course.description: Mark this course as the first course at service time (T=0). Only one course should have this.
